innovation_matrix.title: OneDrive Intake Orchestration
innovation_matrix.impact: Transforms source folders into normalized Markdown sidecars and structured manifest rows.
innovation_matrix.signal: Batch intake with root + glob controls

innovation_matrix.title: Email Consolidation & De-duplication
innovation_matrix.impact: Merges overlapping exports, preserves strongest dates, and removes redundant rows.

innovation_matrix.title: Sync Payload Planning
innovation_matrix.impact: Generates deterministic create/update payload plans before live sync execution.

innovation_matrix.title: Manual Override Governance
innovation_matrix.impact: Allows explicit case-link or no-case directives with reason tracking and replay safety.

innovation_matrix.title: Repo Consistency Sweep
innovation_matrix.impact: Flags manifest drift, uncataloged canonical files, and missing sidecar coverage.

innovation_matrix.title: Tactical Brief CLI
innovation_matrix.impact: Builds matter-specific and daily operating briefs from manifest + case indexes.

innovation_matrix.title: Pattern Phenomenology Registry
innovation_matrix.impact: Tracks recurring behavioral patterns for longitudinal retrieval and pattern heat.
innovation_matrix.signal: Pattern hits grouped by strategic band

innovation_matrix.title: Character/Cast Indexing
innovation_matrix.impact: Clusters recurring actors and aliases to preserve context across matters.
innovation_matrix.signal: Role-based cast cards with matter counts

innovation_matrix.title: Runway Deadline Bands
innovation_matrix.impact: Converts raw event dates into urgency bands for immediate triage.

innovation_matrix.title: Static Portal App State
innovation_matrix.impact: Delivers dashboard + tables + preferences using JSON snapshots and local storage only.

innovation_matrix.title: Billing Readiness Snapshots
innovation_matrix.impact: Computes line-item totals from configurable rates for rapid engagement previews.

innovation_matrix.title: Workflow Packet Staging
innovation_matrix.impact: Stages chronology, treatment, and damages notes before downstream packet workflows.

innovation_matrix.title: Brain Skill v12.1 Recall Routing
innovation_matrix.impact: Routes Claude to the right source surface for any question so no session starts from zero.
innovation_matrix.signal: Versioned codex routing with read-before-assert discipline

innovation_matrix.title: Governance Guardrails & Audit Gate
innovation_matrix.impact: PR communication standard plus pre-commit guardrails enforce a uniform audit trail across every change.

innovation_matrix.title: Gitleaks Secret Scanning
innovation_matrix.impact: Free GHAS-class secret scanning runs on every push to keep credentials out of the corpus.

innovation_matrix.title: Notion Drift Report
innovation_matrix.impact: Read-only Legal Matters audit surfaces drift between repo and Notion without ever writing to Notion.

innovation_matrix.title: Watchlist Digest
innovation_matrix.impact: Declarative watchlist over the manifest tracks names, aliases, patterns, and cases the operator cares about.

innovation_matrix.title: Cloud Repo Repair Automation
innovation_matrix.impact: Deterministic cloud runs snapshot, refresh KPIs, run consistency checks, and bundle a handoff report.

innovation_matrix.title: Deployment Platform Matrix
innovation_matrix.impact: Cloudflare Pages, Railway bot, and optional Vercel are documented in a single keep/cut runbook.

innovation_matrix.title: Command Platform Foundation
innovation_matrix.impact: FastAPI portal + Dockerfile + Railway config establish a multi-user command surface on top of the corpus.

innovation_matrix.title: Corpus KPI Campaign Block
innovation_matrix.impact: corpus_kpis.json exposes unanalyzed_active_total and unanalyzed_by_type so backlog can be prioritized by artifact type.

innovation_matrix.title: 615+ Test Verification Suite
innovation_matrix.impact: Parameterized artifact verification (752 tests) runs on every PR — structure, schema, manifest invariants, and per-artifact integrity are enforced on every push.
innovation_matrix.signal: node + python + corpus checks in one workflow

innovation_matrix.title: Working Corpus On Disk
innovation_matrix.impact: 78 working artifacts (cases, depositions, transcripts, emails, motions, characters, patterns, billing) demonstrate the platform shape that visitors can browse, fork, and run end-to-end.
innovation_matrix.signal: browseable corpus, deterministic generator, full test coverage
